home.title: Pager
home.description: Pager helps you exchange quick updates with other users and stay informed with instant mobile notifications.
home.step1: Download the app on your mobile device by adding it to your home screen.
home.step4: Send messages between users and receive notifications on your mobile phone.

enablePushButton.unsupported: Push is not supported in this browser
enablePushButton.error: Could not enable notifications. Try again.

form.success: Account created. You can now sign in.
form.error: Unable to sign up right now.
